HWND __thiscall FUN_0060db20(int param_1,HINSTANCE param_2,int param_3,int param_4)

{
  int in_EAX;
  HWND hWnd;
  UINT uFlags;
  HWND hWndInsertAfter;
  DWORD dwExStyle;
  undefined *dwStyle;
  tagRECT local_10;
  
  local_10.right = param_1 + param_3;
  local_10.bottom = in_EAX + param_4;
  dwExStyle = 0;
  hWndInsertAfter = (HWND)0x0;
  if (DAT_008afbd9 == '\0') {
    dwStyle = &DAT_00cf0000;
    uFlags = 3;
    local_10.left = param_1;
    local_10.top = in_EAX;
  }
  else {
    dwStyle = (undefined *)0x80000000;
    uFlags = 0x2003;
    local_10.left = 0;
    local_10.top = 0;
    hWndInsertAfter = (HWND)0xffffffff;
    dwExStyle = 8;
  }
  AdjustWindowRectEx(&local_10,(DWORD)dwStyle,0,dwExStyle);
  hWnd = CreateWindowExA(dwExStyle,"OrderOfThePhoenixMainWndClass","",(DWORD)dwStyle,local_10.left,
                         local_10.top,local_10.right - local_10.left,local_10.bottom - local_10.top,
                         (HWND)0x0,(HMENU)0x0,param_2,(LPVOID)0x0);
  ShowWindow(hWnd,0);
  SetWindowPos(hWnd,hWndInsertAfter,0,0,0,0,uFlags);
  if (DAT_008afbd9 != '\0') {
    SetMenu(hWnd,(HMENU)0x0);
    SetThreadExecutionState(0x80000002);
  }
  ShowWindow(hWnd,5);
  return hWnd;
}
